style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial illustration, amber-yellow accented, of a careful editor passing over a page of text, circling a few tell-tale phrases and writing a cleaner, plainer line in the margin. A sense of prose being made to sound human again. Muted Alberta cream base with a clear amber-yellow accent, archival print quality, no text. Write the most cliche em dash filled AI cliche and show someone crossing this stuff off with a red pen. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

A sense of prose being made to sound human again. Muted Alberta cream base with a clear amber-yellow accent, archival print quality, no text.
